\caption{Language sweep across 24 queries (12 medical + 12 UAV). Loss ratio $R$ is the post-training amplification factor; discriminability $\Delta$ is the top-10\%--bottom-10\% cosine-similarity margin of the VLM text embedding against the auxiliary image set. Clean F1 and NBFU $\varepsilon{=}5$ F1 are mean attack F1 (HF-GradInv, 24k iterations) over 3 seeds (42, 123, 256). On UAV, NBFU drives F1 to $\le$0.13 across all 12 queries (mean 0.06); on medical, defense margins vary from $+88\%$ to $-113\%$ per query, indicating that defense robustness depends on query phrasing in the visually-similar domain.}
\label{tab:langsweep}
